message: I purchased this item to photograph for some abstract compositions.  It did not disappoint.  Craftsmanship and colors are exquisite!

Crazy cool marble. Love it!

It’s absolutely PERFECT, and clearly exceptional quality. This wasn’t made by a beginner! It’s like a tiny iridescent universe is inside a ball of water. I have it on my desk and I keep picking it up to admire it. This is one of my prized possessions now - I’m so pleased to own such a jewel, and will be back for more!
Stunning. Love the color. I love marbles

It is really pretty. There were some issues with the international shipping, but the shop owner made it happen. I wish I had ordered one a bit bigger (the item was described right, I just misjudged the size).

This glass marble is amazing!  Absolutely amazing!  It really is a piece of art.  I have it displayed on my desk and I bought a uv flashlight so I can see it glow :>  Very happy with it and thanks for the extra :>  It arrived very quickly and was very well packaged.  Thanks so much!!
So beautiful and unique! Even prettier in person.

Simply put… it’s gorgeous!  I’m supper happy with this piece. It goes perfectly with my small glass collection. 
I was also thrilled to see the stand that was sent with it. I’m not sure if they listed the stand as part of the purchase but without it I was a bit worried about how I would display this piece. The stand they sent is perfect for this piece and is incredibly useful. 
It was very cool to find a piece that would look fantastic and isn’t a marble or a functional piece of glass. I really needed something that added a little bit of diversity in my display cabinet and this piece is more than perfect for exactly that. 
I am so happy with this purchase!!!

I was so intrigued by this artists work that I purchased two pieces at once! I am so thrilled that I did, and seeing this magical work in person just makes me want to purchase more! I am obsessed! This is a dainty little flower frozen in its own little exquisite universe! Seller did everything right! Quality is exceptional! Shipping was fast and secure. I am beyond happy and can’t wait to purchase more pieces! Highly recommend this seller! Everyone needs a little magic in their lives, and this artist delivers! Thank you for everything!

I am so very happy with my purchase from this magical shop! It’s hard to imagine from the photos that these pieces can actually look this amazing in person, and yet they exceeded all of my expectations! This is glass art at its finest! The three dimensional little world this artist creates will surprise, delight, and draw you in! I am mesmerized by the impeccable craftsmanship and artistry in these tiny but impactful pieces! The quality is apparent in every detail and I am just blown away! The seller was wonderful, the shipping was fast and secure, and the little 3D printed stands were such a cool touch! I am the happiest customer and can’t wait to purchase my next little treasure! Buy with confidence! You will not be disappointed! I highly recommend this seller and their amazing work!
Amazing mib, the biggest one I have to date,  and the price was very reasonable. Can't wait to find the next one from him that I want!

It looks even better in person! It looked more pink than gray around the opal on my chest but against something dark, you can see the silver waves again. I like that it has two looks. I like pink too. My favorite part of the design was something I missed in the photos. The faceting was shaped to be a star! So unique and cool! Why is that not a thing more in general? x) With the opal it was like something was glowing in the silvery 'waves' of the star. It came with a silver chain. I likehow sturdy it is too, makes me worry less. Got stuck in customs for a while, but that's out of our control. The part of shipping done by the seller is great. Shipped fast. Fast responses.The pendant was wrapped several times over and I really appreciated that with the long trip to me. Love this artist's style,color choice+ service would buy again.
